Metadata.SourceFile: Inspector Gadget and the Circus of Fear.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0BB8 "INSPECTORGADGET-0BB8" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Inspector Gadget and the Circus of Fear.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Changed the $01 at $0E44 to $00 to default to joystick control.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
